feature.name: Summarizer API performance preference
feature.creator: jaeone@google.com
feature.summary: The current Summarizer (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5193953788559360) relies on large on-device models, which can imply high latency, high resource usage, and limited device compatibility. We propose adding a preference parameter to SummarizerCreateCoreOptions, enabling developers to explicitly balance model capabilities against performance and broader device support.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2026-02-23 by jaeone@google.com). The current Summarizer (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5193953788559360) relies on large on-device models, which can imply high latency, high resource usage, and limited device compatibility. We propose adding a preference parameter to SummarizerCreateCoreOptions, enabling developers to explicitly balance model capabilities against performance and broader device support. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: Blink>AI>Writing Assistance. Stars: 80.
